risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material choice.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust material if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in deployable rail guides.
risk.mit: Add stiffeners to rail guides to increase stiffness.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening fasteners leading to damage.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and conduct torque calibration.

risk.desc: Risk of poor thermal management in electronics area.
risk.mit: Improve thermal management by adding heat sinks or thermal vias.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for field maintenance.
risk.mit: Ensure service access panels are large enough for maintenance.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U CubeSat primary frame, deployable rail guide grooves, PC/104 standoffs

physics_paths.description: Structural loads from launch vibration are distributed across the frame.
Thermal gradients are managed by the frame's thermal conductive properties.
Deployable rails allow for the deployment of external modules.
Electrical connections are made through the PC/104 stack.
Service access is provided through a removable panel.

integration_opportunities.description: Enhance structural integrity by adding stiffeners.
Add deployable rail guides for external module deployment.
Improve electrical connections through optimized PC/104 stack.
Enhance mounting options with corner posts.

verification_focus.description: Verify structural integrity under launch loads.
Verify thermal management under LEO conditions.
Verify electrical connections through PC/104 stack.
Verify mechanical interfaces with neighboring modules.
